tasks.label: Compose: runtime up + ready
tasks.command: bash -lc 'bash scripts/compose-run-profile.sh --profile runtime --action up && bash scripts/compose-profile-ready.sh --profile runtime'

tasks.label: Compose: runtime down
tasks.command: bash

tasks.label: Compose: apps up + ready
tasks.command: bash -lc 'bash scripts/compose-run-profile.sh --profile apps --action up && bash scripts/compose-profile-ready.sh --profile apps'

tasks.label: Compose: frontend react up + ready
tasks.command: bash -lc 'bash scripts/compose-run-profile.sh --profile runtime --action up && bash scripts/compose-profile-ready.sh --profile runtime && bash scripts/compose-run-profile.sh --profile apps --action up && bash scripts/compose-profile-ready.sh --profile apps'

tasks.label: Compose: apps down
tasks.command: bash

tasks.label: Compose: frontend react down
tasks.command: bash -lc 'bash scripts/compose-run-profile.sh --profile apps --action down; bash scripts/compose-run-profile.sh --profile runtime --action down'

tasks.label: Compose: electron-desktop up + ready
tasks.command: bash -lc 'bash scripts/compose-run-profile.sh --profile electron-desktop --action up && bash scripts/compose-profile-ready.sh --profile electron-desktop'

tasks.label: Compose: frontend electron up + ready
tasks.command: bash -lc 'bash scripts/compose-run-profile.sh --profile runtime --action up && bash scripts/compose-profile-ready.sh --profile runtime && bash scripts/compose-run-profile.sh --profile electron-desktop --action up && bash scripts/compose-profile-ready.sh --profile electron-desktop'

tasks.label: Compose: electron-desktop down
tasks.command: bash

tasks.label: Compose: frontend electron down
tasks.command: bash -lc 'bash scripts/compose-run-profile.sh --profile electron-desktop --action down; bash scripts/compose-run-profile.sh --profile runtime --action down'

tasks.label: Compose: mobile up + ready
tasks.command: bash -lc 'bash scripts/compose-run-profile.sh --profile mobile --action up && bash scripts/compose-profile-ready.sh --profile mobile'

tasks.label: Compose: frontend mobile up + ready
tasks.command: bash -lc 'bash scripts/compose-run-profile.sh --profile runtime --action up && bash scripts/compose-profile-ready.sh --profile runtime && bash scripts/compose-run-profile.sh --profile mobile --action up && bash scripts/compose-profile-ready.sh --profile mobile'

tasks.label: Compose: mobile down
tasks.command: bash

tasks.label: Compose: frontend mobile down
tasks.command: bash -lc 'bash scripts/compose-run-profile.sh --profile mobile --action down; bash scripts/compose-run-profile.sh --profile runtime --action down'

tasks.label: Train: not-banana (ci profile)
tasks.command: ${workspaceFolder:(Monorepo) Banana}/.venv/Scripts/python.exe
